Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string, w:string)[ 1,"a","p", 2,"b","q", 3,"c","r" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string, w:string)[ 2,"x","m", 3,"y","n", 4,"z","o" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | project k, k1, v, v1, w, w1 | order by k asc, k1 asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a', 'p'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b', 'q'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c', 'r')) AS t(k, v, w)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x', 'm'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y', 'n'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z', 'o')) AS t(k, v, w)) SELECT k, k1, v, v1, w, w1 FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.v, '') AS v, COALESCE(L.w, '') AS w, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.v, '') AS v1, COALESCE(R.w, '') AS w1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend combo = strcat(v, "|", v1) | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT *, CONCAT(v, '|', v1) AS combo FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.v, '') AS v1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | summarize cnt = countif(isempty(rv)), cntnull = countif(isnull(rv))
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (rv IS NULL OR CAST(rv AS VARCHAR) = '')) AS cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (rv IS NULL)) AS cntnull FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend flag = iff(rv == "", "empty", iff(isnull(rv), "null", rv)) | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT *, CASE WHEN rv = '' THEN 'empty' ELSE CASE WHEN (rv IS NULL) THEN 'null' ELSE TRY_CAST(rv AS VARCHAR) END END AS flag FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:int)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30, 4,40 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:int)[ 2,200, 3,300 ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | extend s = lv + rv, c = lv + coalesce(rv, 0) | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 10), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 20), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 30), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 40)) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 200), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 300)) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT *, lv + rv AS s, lv + COALESCE(rv, 0) AS c FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:real)[ 1,1.5, 2,2.5, 3,3.5 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:real)[ 2,20.0, 3,30.0 ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | extend both = lv * rv | order by k asc, k1 asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(3.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20.0 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30.0 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT *, lv * rv AS both FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, z:string)[ 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; A | union B | project x, y, z | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, z)) SELECT x, y, z FROM ((SELECT *, '' AS z FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, '' AS y FROM (SELECT * FROM B))) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, s:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, s:string)[ 2,"c", 3,"d" ]; let C = datatable(x:long, s:string)[ 3,"e", 4,"f" ]; union withsource=src A, B, C | summarize n=count(), vals=make_set(s) by src | order by src asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, s)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, s)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'e'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'f')) AS t(x, s)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT src, COUNT(*) AS n, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS vals FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM B)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg2' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM C))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY src ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, s:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, s:string)[ 2,"c" ]; union withsource=src A, B | where src has "B" | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, s)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(x, s)) SELECT * FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS src FROM (SELECT * FROM B))) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(src AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\bB\b') ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 3,30 ]; union withsource=tbl kind=outer A, B | extend src2 = tbl | project x, y, src2 | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)) SELECT x, y, src2 FROM (SELECT *, tbl AS src2 FROM ((SELECT *, 'union_arg0' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM A)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, 'union_arg1' AS tbl FROM (SELECT * FROM B)))) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 1,"b", 2,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 1,"y", 2,"z" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | project k, v, v1 | order by v asc, v1 asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, v, v1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY v ASC NULLS FIRST, v1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 2,20, 2,21 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 1,101, 2,200 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k | summarize n=count() by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(21 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(101 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,11, 1,12 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 1,101, 1,102 ]; L | join kind=innerunique R on k | summarize n=count()
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(11 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(12 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(101 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(102 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM L QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k) = 1) AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", long(null),"n1", long(null),"n2" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", long(null),"m1", long(null),"m2" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | order by lv asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'n1'), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'n2')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'm1'), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'm2')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", long(null),"n" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ long(null),"m", 2,"y" ]; L | join kind=rightouter R on k | project k, k1, lv, rv | order by rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'n')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), 'm'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT k, k1, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L RIGHT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:string, lv:string)[ 1,"p","l1", 2,"q","l2", 3,"r","l3" ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:string, rv:string)[ 1,"p","r1", 2,"x","r2", 3,"r","r3" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on a, b | project a, a1, b, b1, lv, rv | order by lv asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p', 'l1'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q', 'l2'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'r', 'l3')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p', 'r1'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x', 'r2'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'r', 'r3')) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT a, a1, b, b1, lv, rv FROM (SELECT L.a, COALESCE(L.b, '') AS b, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.a AS a1, COALESCE(R.b, '') AS b1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.a IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.a AND L.b IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.b) ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long, lv:string)[ 1,1,"p", 1,2,"q", 2,2,"r" ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long, rv:string)[ 1,2,"x", 2,2,"y", 9,9,"z" ]; L | join kind=rightanti R on a, b | order by a asc, b asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(9 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT L.* FROM R AS L WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM L AS R WHERE R.a = L.a AND R.b = L.b) ORDER BY a ASC NULLS FIRST, b ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(a:long, b:long, lv:string)[ 1,1,"p", 1,2,"q", 2,2,"r", 2,2,"r2" ]; let R = datatable(a:long, b:long, rv:string)[ 1,2,"x", 2,2,"y" ]; L | join kind=leftsemi R on a, b | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'r2')) AS t(a, b, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(a, b, rv)) SELECT L.* FROM L AS L WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM R AS R WHERE L.a = R.a AND L.b = R.b) ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; L | join kind=rightsemi R on k | project k, rv | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT k, rv FROM (SELECT L.* FROM R AS L WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM L AS R WHERE R.k = L.k)) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 3,"z", 5,"w" ]; L | lookup kind=leftouter R on k | extend tag = iff(isnull(rv), "miss", "hit") | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z'), (CAST(5 AS BIGINT), 'w')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT *, CASE WHEN (rv IS NULL) THEN 'miss' ELSE 'hit' END AS tag FROM (SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"x", 3,"z" ]; L | lookup R on k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, lv)) SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.lv, '') AS lv1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; L | lookup R on k | project k, v | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, v FROM (SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.v, '') AS v1 FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 1,"x2", 3,"z" ]; L | lookup kind=leftouter R on k | order by k asc, rv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x2'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, rv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; let M = datatable(k:long, mv:string)[ 1,"p", 2,"q" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | join kind=inner M on k | project k, lv, rv, mv | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, rv)), M AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q')) AS t(k, mv)) SELECT k, lv, rv, mv FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.mv FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L INNER JOIN M AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"x", 2,"y" ]; let M = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"p", 2,"q" ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | join kind=inner M on k | project k, v, v1, v2 | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'y')) AS t(k, v)), M AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'p'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'q')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, v, v1, v2 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.v AS v2 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1 FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L INNER JOIN M AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 2,"c", 3,"d" ]; let C = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 3,"e", 4,"f" ]; A | union B, C | summarize total=count() by x | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, y)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'e'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'f')) AS t(x, y)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM C)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string, z:long)[ 1,"a",100 ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 2,"b" ]; let C = datatable(x:long)[ 3 ]; union A, B, C | project x, y, z | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a', CAST(100 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y, z)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) SELECT x, y, z FROM ((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT *, '' AS y FROM (SELECT * FROM C))) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(a:long, b:string)[ 1,"a" ]; let B = datatable(b:string, a:long)[ "b",2 ]; let C = datatable(a:long, b:string, c:real)[ 3,"c",3.5 ]; union A, B, C | order by a asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a')) AS t(a, b)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('b', CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(b, a)), C AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c', CAST(3.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(a, b, c)) (SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM C) ORDER BY a ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | where isnull(v) or isnull(v1) | project k, k1, v, v1 | order by k asc, k1 asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, k1, v, v1 FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.v, '') AS v, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.v, '') AS v1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) WHERE (v IS NULL) OR (v1 IS NULL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, lv:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let R = datatable(k:long, rv:string)[ 2,"x", 3,"y", 4,"z" ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | summarize leftonly=countif(isnull(rv)), rightonly=countif(isnull(lv)), both=countif(isnotnull(lv) and isnotnull(rv))
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'x'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'y'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'z')) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (rv IS NULL)) AS leftonly, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (lv IS NULL)) AS rightonly, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (lv IS NOT NULL) AND (rv IS NOT NULL)) AS both FROM (SELECT L.k, COALESCE(L.lv, '') AS lv, R.k AS k1, COALESCE(R.rv, '') AS rv FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)

Kql: let L = datatable(k:string, lv:long)[ "Alpha",1, "beta",2, "GAMMA",3 ]; let R = datatable(k:string, rv:long)[ "alpha",10, "BETA",20, "gamma",30 ]; L | join kind=inner R on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('Alpha', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('beta', CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), ('GAMMA', CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('alpha', CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), ('BETA', CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), ('gamma', CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L INNER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:string, lv:long)[ "café",1, "café",2 ]; let R = datatable(k:string, rv:long)[ "café",10 ]; L | join kind=leftouter R on k | order by lv asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('café', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('café', CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('café', CAST(10 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, rv)) SELECT L.*, COALESCE(R.k, '') AS k1, R.rv FROM L AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k ORDER BY lv ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ]; let R = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,100, 2,200, 4,400 ]; L | union R | summarize s=sum(v), n=count() by k | order by k asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(400 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ((SELECT * FROM L) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM R)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let L = datatable(k:long, t:datetime)[ 1,datetime(2020-01-01), 2,datetime(2021-01-01) ]; let R = datatable(k:long, t:datetime)[ 1,datetime(2019-06-01), 3,datetime(2022-01-01) ]; L | join kind=fullouter R on k | project k, k1, t, t1, diff = t - t1 | order by k asc, k1 asc
Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00')) AS t(k, t)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2019-06-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00')) AS t(k, t)) SELECT k, k1, t, t1, t - t1 AS diff FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.t AS t1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let A = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ]; let B = datatable(x:long, y:string)[ 3,"c", 4,"d" ]; A | union B | join kind=inner (A | union B | project x, y2=y) on x | summarize n=count() by x | order by x asc
Sql: WITH A AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, y)), B AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c'), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), 'd')) AS t(x, y)) SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (x AS x1) FROM ((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B)) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT x, y AS y2 FROM ((SELECT * FROM A) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM B))) AS R ON L.x IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.x) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY x ASC NULLS FIRST

Sql: WITH L AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), '{"n":1}'::JSON), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), '{"n":2}'::JSON)) AS t(k, lv)), R AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), LIST_VALUE(9, 8)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), LIST_VALUE(7, 6))) AS t(k, lv)) SELECT k, k1, lv AS leftd, lv1 AS rightd FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.lv AS lv1 FROM L AS L FULL OUTER JOIN R AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, k1 ASC NULLS FIRST
